title: Input Actions, Bindings, Focus, and Keyboard Equivalence
description: Canvas clicks are the only navigation method, global key bindings fire inside text fields, focus becomes invisible, and repeat events race state changes. Learners cumulatively produce remappable action and focus-navigation map through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Map keys, pointer gestures, buttons, and assistive commands onto named actions separated from solver state changes.
Choose widget, class, toplevel, tag, and bindtag scope while preserving expected default behavior.
Provide logical focus order, programmatic focus placement, visible focus, escape paths, and focus restoration after dialogs.
